description: Graffiticode charting dialect. Compiles small declarative programs into Apache ECharts visualizations (bar, line, pie/donut/nightingale rose) and static HTML artifacts (data tables, KPI cards). Single-series constructors (bar, line, pie) double as complete charts; the `chart` wrapper combines multiple series on shared or dual y-axes. Right tool for analytics dashboards, report visualizations, and assessment-style data displays. Not the right tool for relational/network charts (graph, sankey, tree), interactive editing, or anything that needs external data fetching.

example_prompts.prompt: Create a bar chart of Q1–Q4 revenue with values 320, 450, 380, 510.
example_prompts.notes: Single-series sugar: a bare `bar` constructor at the top level compiles to a complete chart.

example_prompts.prompt: Show weekly visits as a smooth line chart for Mon–Sun with values 1200, 1340, 1500, 1450, 1700, 1850, 1900.
example_prompts.notes: Standalone `line smooth true ...` — minimal trend chart.

example_prompts.prompt: Donut chart of market share: A 40, B 35, C 25 — with the title "Market share".
example_prompts.notes: Donut = `pie` with `inner-radius`. Data is a list of {name, value} records.

example_prompts.prompt: Nightingale rose chart of weekday visits Mon=120, Tue=200, Wed=150, Thu=80, Fri=70, Sat=110, Sun=130.
example_prompts.notes: Rose = `pie` with `rose-type radius`. Per-slice values drive radius.

example_prompts.prompt: Combo chart with bars for Revenue [320, 450, 380, 510] and a line for Growth% [5, 12, -3, 8] over Q1–Q4 with dual y-axes.
example_prompts.notes: Multi-series with `y-axis-right` and `axis right` on the line — canonical dual-axis pattern.

example_prompts.prompt: Create a table of quarterly results with columns Quarter, Revenue, Growth and rows Q1 320 0.05, Q2 450 0.12, Q3 380 -0.03, Q4 510 0.08.
example_prompts.notes: Static HTML table — exercises `headers`, `rows`, and the default striped/bordered styling.

example_prompts.prompt: KPI card showing monthly revenue $1,240,000 with a 12% increase, formatted as currency.
example_prompts.notes: KPI auto-derives `deltaDirection` from the sign of `delta`; `format currency` formats via Intl.NumberFormat.

example_prompts.prompt: Bar chart in dark theme titled "Sales" with categories Q1–Q4 and values [320, 450, 380, 510], colored blue-500.
example_prompts.notes: Exercises Tailwind color resolution and theme propagation to the envelope.

example_prompts.prompt: Stacked bar chart with two series, Free [50, 70, 60] and Pro [120, 140, 130] over weeks 1–3, both stacked under group "signups".
example_prompts.notes: Two `bar` series with the same `stack` group inside a `chart` wrapper.
